mapped_problems.reddit_quote: The prefill phase kills latency when sending huge system prompts. Token bills are unsustainable.
mapped_problems.echoregent_feature: History Compression Pipeline (259 tokens vs 18,679 on LoCoMo benchmark). Cuts API costs by 65%+ with zero code rewrite.

mapped_problems.problem: Redundant Reprocessing of Repeat Developer Queries
mapped_problems.reddit_quote: Developers keep asking similar questions in multi-agent loops, burning thousands of API tokens.
mapped_problems.echoregent_feature: Catches semantically equivalent queries before reaching the compressor. Returning users skip reprocessing entirely; savings compound.

mapped_problems.problem: Stack Trace & Code Noise Bloating Prompt Context
mapped_problems.reddit_quote: Stack traces and verbose log outputs eat 80% of our prompt token allocation.
mapped_problems.echoregent_feature: Fine-tuned classifier detects coding domain and aggressively compresses stack traces while preserving exact semantic code logic.

mapped_problems.problem: Privacy & Compliance Risks on Sensitive Data
mapped_problems.reddit_quote: We can't compress or summarize legal/medical conversations because of data degradation & compliance risk.
mapped_problems.echoregent_feature: Protected Zones automatically disable compression at the function level when medical, legal, or crisis intent is detected.

mapped_problems.problem: Complex Refactoring Required for New AI Tools
mapped_problems.reddit_quote: Switching AI frameworks requires rewriting hundreds of API calls across our backend.
mapped_problems.echoregent_feature: Simply update `baseURL: 'https://api.Prexi.ai/v1'` in your existing OpenAI SDK setup. Zero application code changes.

mapped_problems.reddit_quote: Using an extra LLM call to classify intent adds 500ms+ latency to every turn.
mapped_problems.echoregent_feature: Purpose-built non-LLM classification pipeline across 10 domains (coding, legal, medical, support). Adds <5ms overhead.

mapped_problems.problem: Inferior Context Recall in Competitor Tools (mem0)
mapped_problems.reddit_quote: Mem0 and basic vector stores lose accuracy and use high token counts for chat history.
mapped_problems.echoregent_value_prop: Higher F1 Score with 26x Fewer Tokens
mapped_problems.echoregent_feature: Outperforms mem0 on the published LoCoMo benchmark (259 tokens vs mem0's 6,956 tokens) with higher QA F1 recall score.

mapped_problems.problem: Multi-Provider Vendor Lock-In (GPT vs Claude vs Gemini)
mapped_problems.reddit_quote: We use GPT-4o for code, Claude for long text, and Gemini for search. Managing context across providers is painful.
mapped_problems.echoregent_feature: Works seamlessly as a unified middleware layer across GPT-4o, Claude 3.5 Sonnet, Gemini 1.5, or local OpenAI-compatible endpoints.

mapped_problems.problem: Data Privacy Concerns with 3rd Party Data Sharing
mapped_problems.reddit_quote: We cannot send raw user context to unverified 3rd party memory SaaS platforms.
mapped_problems.echoregent_feature: All context classification, compression, and caching is processed in-line with zero third-party data sharing.

mapped_problems.problem: High Cost Barriers for Scaling AI Prototypes
mapped_problems.reddit_quote: Scaling from 1,000 to 100,000 active users blows up monthly API bills exponentially.
mapped_problems.echoregent_feature: 10 Million tokens free every month (no credit card required). Scales to 250M+ tokens/month smoothly.
